title: T-047 — UI parity: consumption, output, waste, genealogy and scanner-linked cards
prompt:
# T-047 — UI parity: consumption, output, waste, genealogy and scanner-linked cards

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-02, SCR-08-12, prototype labels consumption_tab,output_tab,genealogy_tab,history_tab,scanner_modal

Goal: Build WO execution tabs for consumption/output/waste/genealogy/history and scanner deep-link cards.

Implementation details:
Use Next.js App Router Server Components by default, shadcn/ui components, next-intl keys, org-scoped data access, loading/empty/error states, and literal data-prototype-label markers matching _meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-production.json. Closeout must include desktop screenshots and Playwright traces. Match prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/wo-detail.jsx:90-358 and modals.jsx:246-278. Scanner cards issue signed 15-minute single-use deep links but do not mutate production data. Consumption/output tabs must surface FEFO, over-consumption approval status, catch weight, label PDF and QA hold badges from APIs.

Scope files:
- apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/consume/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/output/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/production/wos/[id]/waste/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/production/scanner-deeplink-card.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/wo-detail.jsx:90-358
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/modals.jsx:246-278

Acceptance criteria:
1. Tabs match prototype labels and render loading/empty/error states
2. Scanner deep links are signed single-use tokens with no desktop mutation side effects
3. Closeout includes screenshots for consumption/output/waste tabs and Playwright trace

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.

test_strategy: RED: add failing unit/integration tests for the cited slice before implementation
GREEN: run targeted pnpm test command and relevant Playwright check
risk_red_lines: Do not treat D365 sync/export/Built as production release source-of-truth
Do not bypass 04-PLANNING WO snapshot or 03-TECHNICAL active factory spec/BOM approval

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Scanner consumes Production deep links and production runtime endpoints for consume/output/waste/execute.
LP availability, status, QA hold, putaway and inventory adjustments are Warehouse-owned contracts.
QA holds/sampling/inspection requests are Quality-owned cross-module contract; keep adapter seam typed until Quality task ID is finalized.

pipeline_inputs.priority_normalization_note: Priority normalized to ACP convention bands on 2026-05-03; lower number means earlier execution.
